Something special for you

Hey Haj, ik its your special day today, so I just wanted to make it a bit interesting
and a little special.

the guessing game

before we go further... can you guess today's theme?

not quite — try again

scratch & reveal

good guess. something's warming up.

scratch below — carefully, there's a little clue under there.

someone made you into a whole new character today — flower in her hair, golden light all around her.

click & drag to scratch

trace it

that's you, YOU DEFINITELY ARE A STAR!

tap the star

Happy Birthday, Haj

Hope today feels exactly this golden, have a great one, Haj. I just wanted to do something a little extra to make you feel special today. Maybe I also used your birthday as an excuse to say how much I appreciate you, so I had to make it count. I put this together because I wanted to make your day just a little brighter. I hope you loved this tiny gesture
